home.subtitle: I love building beautiful, user-friendly UIs with TypeScript and React. I share my learnings through blog posts.

about.title: About
about.catchcopy: An engineer who sees technology as a means of solving problems, learning full-stack development centered on the backend
about.bio: Based in Kanagawa. An aspiring engineer learning web development independently. I aim to build full-stack development skills with a focus on the backend, and I'm interested in database design and test-driven development with AI.
reasonParagraphs: After withdrawing from university due to health issues and recovering at my family home, I spent time exploring what I truly wanted to dedicate myself to. It was through my close friend, a full-stack engineer working in web development, that I discovered this field. With their guidance, I began my journey by learning Python scripting.
As I progressed, my interest expanded to data processing and development with AI APIs, and I started working with web technologies like HTML/CSS, JavaScript, and SQL.

I've always had a strong fascination with 'making things' and 'seeing something respond to actions.' As a child, I loved building cities and tracks with blocks and toys, and I was amazed by games where the screen changed with button presses. In university, through Arduino development and UX design exercises, I experienced the thrill of code making things actually move and designing value from a user's perspective.

Through these experiences, I realized I find deep satisfaction in the process of writing code, understanding how things work, and iterating through trial and error. Even when things get difficult, the desire to 'create' and 'make it happen' never fades, and I've come to believe I want to create value as an engineer.

My goal is to become an engineer who can develop web services single-handedly — services that understand users' challenges and solve them with my own skills. I want to cherish the wonder I felt as a child when 'things moved in response to actions,' and contribute to building things that help people and organizations through technology.
about.current: I'm currently working on developer support tools and improving my practical development skills through test-driven development with Claude.

careerItems.description: Graduated from Kanagawa Prefectural Atsugi Seinan High School
Enrolled in Tokyo Denki University, Faculty of Systems Design Engineering
Withdrew from university. Began recovering from health issues at home
Started learning programming with Python scripting
Started learning HTML/CSS, JavaScript, and FastAPI
Took the Fundamental Information Technology Engineer Exam for the first time
Studied CLI tools and built a Discord BOT
Passed the Fundamental Information Technology Engineer Exam
Built a web-based customizable chatbot using the AI API
Learned practical usage of Claude (prompts, Skills, Hooks, Agents, MCP, etc.)
Learned Git and GitHub; created a public GitHub account
Started developing kudos-loop, a team development support tool
